name: CastleNet Technology Inc.
summary: CastleNet Technology Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells network communication equipment in Taiwan. It offers data cable modems, data and EMTA gateway products, and embedded cable modem modules, as well as products in the WAN, LAN, and wireless fields to MSO, telecom, and ISP companies. It also supplies its products to Europe, Japan, and Korea. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
